# Clear registers first (pass 0 to r0-r3)
0000000000000000  # chip=0 (pass-through), out_addr=0 (r0), input_a=0, input_b=blank(3)
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
0000000000000011

0000000000000000  # same for r1
0000000000000001
0000000000000000
0000000000000011

0000000000000000  # r2
0000000000000010
0000000000000000
0000000000000011

0000000000000000  # r3
0000000000000011
0000000000000000
0000000000000011

# Load 1 into r0
0000000000000000  # pass constant 1 -> r0
0000000000000000
0000000000000001
0000000000000011

# Load 1 into r1 (for NAND 1,1 -> 0)
0000000000000000
0000000000000001
0000000000000001
0000000000000011

# Compute NAND r0 and r1 -> temp ram[10]
0000000000000001  # chip=1 (nand), out_addr=10 (temp), input_a=ram[0] (16), input_b=ram[1] (17)
0000000000001010
0000000000010000  # 16 = ram[0]
0000000000010001  # 17 = ram[1]

# Copy result from temp to r2
0000000000000000  # pass
0000000000000010  # out r2
0000000000101010  # input_a = ram[10] (42 in decimal, binary 000000101010)
0000000000000011  # blank

# Output r2 to tape (addr=0 means prepend to cli_tape.txt)
0000000000000000  # pass to tape
0000000000000000
0000000000000010  # input_a = ram[2] (18 in decimal = ram[2])
0000000000000011
